intent.rawPrompt: Ok im working on a cool poc for intent driven development. i want to create an e2e test for it. the e2e tests should verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step.

businessIntent.statement: Ok im working on a cool poc for intent driven development. i want to create an e2e test for it. the e2e tests should verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: Create an e2e test to verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step.

acceptanceCriteria.description: verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step
Intent is translated into executable work for demo-catalog.
Evidence is captured and stored as a baseline that can be reviewed later.
Results are packaged so they can be distributed consistently, with the desired outcome of: Create an e2e test to verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step..

scenarios.title: Intent is translated into acceptance-ready work
scenarios.goal: Turn the raw business statement into reviewable BDD structure.
given: A business intent has been captured: Ok im working on a cool poc for intent driven development. i want to create an e2e test for it. the e2e tests should verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step.
The desired outcome is explicit: Create an e2e test to verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step.
when: The planner decomposes the intent into acceptance criteria and scenarios.
Applicable sources and destinations are identified from the prompt and configuration.
then: verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step
Intent is translated into executable work for demo-catalog.

scenarios.title: Executable evidence is prepared for applicable sources
scenarios.goal: Define what visible verification should happen for each source involved in the intent.
given: Source demo-catalog is available for execution.
when: Execution is prepared in baseline mode.
Visible evidence tooling is assigned to each applicable source.
then: Evidence is ready to be gathered from demo-catalog.
The resulting work remains understandable without a specific agent implementation.

scenarios.title: Results are distributed consistently
scenarios.goal: Make the outputs visible in the places that matter to stakeholders.
given: Execution produces evidence, summaries, and progress state.
Distribution destinations are known before execution begins.
when: The run reaches the distribution stage.
Publishing destinations receive the resulting evidence and summaries.
then: Stakeholders can inspect the outcome through a consistent package tied to the intent.
Distribution remains decoupled from any single source-specific workflow.

workItems.title: Intent is translated into acceptance-ready work
workItems.description: Turn the raw business statement into reviewable BDD structure.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: verify that the correct artifacts are created and added after each workflow step
workItems.verification: Intent is translated into executable work for demo-catalog.

workItems.title: Executable evidence is prepared for applicable sources
workItems.description: Define what visible verification should happen for each source involved in the intent.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: Evidence is ready to be gathered from demo-catalog.
workItems.verification: The resulting work remains understandable without a specific agent implementation.

workItems.title: Results are distributed consistently
workItems.description: Make the outputs visible in the places that matter to stakeholders.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: Stakeholders can inspect the outcome through a consistent package tied to the intent.
workItems.verification: Distribution remains decoupled from any single source-specific workflow.

workItems.title: Produce visible evidence for demo-catalog
workItems.description: Make the outcome of the intent inspectable through the evidence tools configured for demo-catalog.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: Users can verify the outcome for demo-catalog without reading implementation details.
workItems.verification: Evidence for demo-catalog is linked back to the intent and its scenarios.

repoCandidates.label: Intent Driven Development POC
repoCandidates.reason: Source demo-catalog was selected by Gemini prompt normalization.
repoCandidates.summary: Current workspace used to exercise low-risk prompt normalization and demo evidence flows.
notes: Use this source for prompt-planning and dry-run validation inside the Intent Driven Development POC.
Keep this source scoped to the built-in demo surfaces for the POC.
Configured visual captures across linked sources: 49.

plannerSections.title: IDD Plan
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned business plan with acceptance criteria, repo context, execution lanes, and delivery notes.

plannerSections.title: IDD Source Lane: demo-catalog
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned lane for demo-catalog, intended for downstream implementation and verification handoff.

sources.selectionReason: Source demo-catalog was selected by Gemini prompt normalization.

destinations.label: Controller artifacts
destinations.reason: Local evidence bundles are always written by the controller.
details: Stores plan, manifests, logs, captures, and summaries on disk.

destinations.label: Linear parent issue
destinations.reason: Linear is the preferred destination for the BDD/TDD plan, but it is currently disabled in config.
details: Carries the business intent, acceptance criteria, scenarios, work items, and execution updates.
Enable config.linear.enabled to publish automatically.

destinations.label: Source workspace publication
destinations.reason: Workspace publishing is disabled until artifacts.storageMode is set to 'both'.
details: Useful when evidence should live beside the source repository.

destinations.label: Business process controls
destinations.reason: The prompt references process-level rollout, which should become an explicit destination in the system.
details: Future publisher: approval gates, process checklists, or automation hooks.

tools.label: Intent planning
tools.reason: The system converts the raw prompt into reviewable BDD and TDD structure before execution.
details: Deterministic and human-reviewable until a real agent is introduced.

tools.label: Visual evidence capture
tools.reason: Applicable sources currently expose visual capture definitions.
details: Playwright screenshots remain one execution tool rather than the top-level product model.

tools.label: Evidence comparison
tools.reason: Comparison is not required for a baseline-only execution.
details: Uses pixel diff today; future tools can add non-visual verification.

tools.label: Evidence reporting
tools.reason: Every run produces summaries and machine-readable manifests.
details: Reports become distribution inputs for destinations like Linear and GitHub.

tools.label: Linear publishing
tools.reason: Linear publishing is planned, but config currently disables it.
details: Intended to carry the parent issue for BDD, AC, and TDD structure.

reviewNotes: Linear publishing is part of the plan, but it is inactive until config.linear.enabled is turned on.

linear.issueTitle: IDD: Ok im working on a cool poc for intent driven development. i want to create an e2e test for it.

warnings: Linear publishing is part of the plan, but it is inactive until config.linear.enabled is turned on.
